summary: M9 Overhead Cost System testing completed. Backend: 24/25 tests passed (96%). Frontend: All UI components working after fixing SelectItem empty value bug. Bulgarian translations verified. Core features working: Categories/Costs/Assets CRUD, Snapshot computation with PersonDays and Hours methods, Project allocation.

minor.issue: Response does not include calculated 'daily_amortization' field (but GET /api/overhead/assets does)

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - SelectItem had empty string value causing React runtime error

issues: Console warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility enhancement suggested

backend: Create cost with all frequencies (OneTime, Monthly, Weekly)
Create cost with all allocation types (CompanyWide, PerPerson, PerAssetAmortized)
frontend: Navigate to Overhead page via sidebar (Режийни)
Costs tab - table with existing costs
Costs tab - new cost button visible
Assets tab - new asset dialog opens without error (BUG FIXED)
Assets tab - daily amortization preview in dialog
Snapshots tab - table with computed snapshots

action_items: MINOR: Add daily_amortization to POST /api/overhead/assets response for consistency
MINOR: Add aria-describedby or DialogDescription to dialog components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: SelectItem value="" is not allowed in shadcn/radix Select - must use non-empty string like 'none'
Backend create_overhead_asset doesn't compute daily_amortization but list_overhead_assets does - inconsistent API response
context_for_next_testing_agent: M9 Overhead Cost System is fully functional. Bug with asset dialog SelectItem has been fixed. Backend API consistency issue (daily_amortization in response) is minor. All CRUD operations work for categories, costs, assets. Snapshot computation and project allocation working. Bulgarian translations complete.
